description: Walking in a puma Triangle flip flop feels like walking on cotton. To add oodles of style, team this flip-flop with casual denims and a comfort Fit T-shirt.UpperQuick-drying rubber upper for dry comfort for the feetThong twill tape construction to hold the forefoot in place, and for added comfort and styleMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfortColoured triangle prints with cat logo on the footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with round suction points all over for grip and tractionslipper careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store in direct sunlight
